items.definition_en: A bandage is a piece of cloth for covering a wound.
items.example_en: The nurse wrapped a bandage around my arm.

items.definition_en: A pill is a small round form of medicine that you swallow.
items.example_en: He took a pill for his headache.

items.definition_en: A syringe is a tool used to inject medicine into your body.
items.example_en: The doctor filled the syringe before giving the injection.

items.definition_en: A tablet is a flat round piece of medicine.
items.example_en: She takes one tablet every morning.

items.definition_en: A stretcher is a special bed for carrying sick or injured people.
items.example_en: The paramedics brought a stretcher to the accident.

items.definition_en: An operation is when doctors fix or remove something in your body.
items.example_en: She needs an operation on her knee.

items.definition_en: A scan is a medical test that uses machines to look inside the body.
items.example_en: He had a scan to check his stomach.

items.definition_en: An injection is medicine given using a needle.
items.example_en: The child cried during the injection.

items.definition_en: A cast is a hard cover to protect a broken bone.
items.example_en: He wore a cast on his leg for six weeks.

items.definition_en: Ointment is a smooth substance you put on the skin to heal it.
items.example_en: The doctor gave her ointment for the burn.

items.definition_en: A sling is a piece of cloth used to support an injured arm.
items.example_en: His arm was in a sling after the accident.

items.definition_en: A crutch is a stick that supports you when you hurt your leg.
items.example_en: She used a crutch to help her walk.

items.definition_en: A dropper is a small tool used for putting drops of liquid in the eyes or nose.
items.example_en: He used a dropper to put medicine in his eye.

items.definition_en: A mask is a covering for your face to protect from illness.
items.example_en: Doctors wear a mask during surgery.

items.definition_en: A plaster is a small sticky piece used to cover a cut.
items.example_en: She put a plaster on her finger.

items.definition_en: An antibiotic is medicine that kills bacteria.
items.example_en: The doctor gave him an antibiotic for the infection.

items.definition_en: A thermometer is a tool to measure your body temperature.
items.example_en: She used a thermometer to check her fever.

items.definition_en: Medicine is something you take to feel better when you are sick.
items.example_en: He takes medicine every day.

items.definition_en: Cough syrup is a liquid taken to help stop coughing.
items.example_en: She drank some cough syrup for her sore throat.

items.definition_en: A painkiller is medicine that stops pain.
items.example_en: He took a painkiller for his headache.
